item.title: Why Robinhood's Nearly 50% Slide Is a Buy-the-Dip Opportunity
item.description: With shares of Robinhood Markets down almost 50% from highs, Wall Street analysts are eyeing a significant rebound going forward.

item.title: Is Albemarle Setting Up for a Lithium-Fueled Rebound?
item.description: Albemarle stock dipped after earnings, but rising lithium demand, particularly from AI-driven power needs could create a compelling long-term entry po...

item.title: 4 Reasons Fortinet Could Be at a Buyable Bottom
item.description: Fortinet is trading at a buyable bottom, as its results are better than expected, analyst sentiment is supportive, and institutions are accumulating.

item.title: A Closer Look at Healthcare Sector Earnings: AZN vs. EW vs. ZBH
item.description: With after-tax profits surging by close to 50% year-over-year, AstraZeneca emerges as a potential winner among healthcare names reporting earnings thi...

item.title: Exelixis Reports Solid Earnings—Are New Highs Back on the Table?
item.description: Exelixis beats earnings estimates as Cabometyx drives profits and zanzalintinib positions the biotech for a major oncology expansion
